sections.heading: Home Inspection Cost Calculator | Estimate Prices
sections.content: Estimate your home inspection cost instantly. Get accurate pricing based on size, age, location, and add-ons. Free calculator, no signup needed.

sections.heading: How to Use This Calculator
sections.content: Enter your values in the calculator above and click calculate to see instant results. Adjust inputs to compare scenarios and find the option that fits your needs.

faq.question: What does the Home Inspection Cost Calculator | Estimate Prices do?
faq.answer: Estimate your home inspection cost instantly. Get accurate pricing based on size, age, location, and add-ons. Free calculator, no signup needed.

faq.question: Is this calculator free to use?
faq.answer: Yes. Smart Calculator tools are free, work in your browser, and require no signup.
